title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
description:
About the job
Title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer

Target: Masters/Bachelors from top schools such as Stanford, MIT, Carnegie Mellon, Berkeley, Oxford, Cambridge, IIT, NUS, ETH Zurich, or equivalent professional achievement, with a passion for beautiful, user-centric products.

Location: USA | Remote

Compensation: $150K - $250K | 0.5% - 1.5% Equity

Visa Sponsorship: Not Available


About Us

We are a pre-launch startup backed by First Round Capital and Y Combinator, building AI-native enterprise workflow application. Our product is a complex, interactive web application that feels as simple and intuitive as the best consumer software. The founding team has previously built and sold a venture-backed company to a major public cloud data platform, and the current team is small, senior, and highly technical.


The Role

As a Senior Full-Stack Engineer on our engineering team of about 10 people, you will play a key role in building and scaling user-facing features that power how people access, understand, and use AI-enabled workflows. You will own product surfaces end-to-end, collaborate closely with design and product, make pragmatic architecture decisions, and ship polished experiences that customers can rely on. We work asynchronously using Slack, Notion, and Linear, prioritizing deep focus, thoughtful writing, and uninterrupted time to build.

If you are excited about crafting great software, working with cutting-edge AI infrastructure, and contributing to a fast-growing platform before launch, we would love to hear from you.


Ideal Profile

Experience
4+ years of professional full-stack or product engineering experience
Proven track record of shipping user-facing products in startup, scale-up, or high-ownership engineering environments
Experience building complex web apps, interactive dashboards, internal tools, workflow software, or clean open-source projects

Technical Strength
Strong experience with React, Next.js, TypeScript, AWS
Strong product intuition, modern JavaScript/runtime knowledge, API design fundamentals, and comfort debugging production systems
Experience with Cloudflare Workers, serverless platforms, edge-first architectures, AI infrastructure, observability, or design systems is a plus

Startup Mindset
Comfortable in fast-moving, ambiguous environments
Proactive, resourceful, and excited to take ownership without waiting for perfect requirements
Able to make tradeoffs, communicate decisions clearly, and move from prototype to production with care

Collaborative & Self-Directed
Clear communicator who works well in async teams
Able to self-manage and deliver high-quality results independently
Comfortable collaborating with founders, designers, customers, and other engineers across time zones

Craft-Focused Engineer
You care deeply about UX, performance, maintainability, accessibility, and small product details
You aim to ship delightful, impactful features, not just functional code


Apply if you've built: complex web apps, interactive dashboards, workflow tools, AI products, developer platforms, or have a GitHub profile full of clean, well-documented code.

We work asynchronously using Slack, Notion, and Linear, prioritizing deep focus, thoughtful writing, and uninterrupted time to build.

If you are excited about crafting great software, working with cutting-edge AI infrastructure, and contributing to a fast-growing platform before launch, we would love to hear from you.


Ideal Profile

Experience
4+ years of professional full-stack or product engineering experience
Proven track record of shipping user-facing products in startup, scale-up, or high-ownership engineering environments
Experience building complex web apps, interactive dashboards, internal tools, workflow software, or clean open-source projects

Technical Strength
Strong experience with LLM, NLP, Python, React
Strong product intuition, modern JavaScript/runtime knowledge, API design fundamentals, and comfort debugging production systems
Experience with Cloudflare Workers, serverless platforms, edge-first architectures, AI infrastructure, observability, or design systems is a plus

Startup Mindset
Comfortable in fast-moving, ambiguous environments
Proactive, resourceful, and excited to take ownership without waiting for perfect requirements
Able to make tradeoffs, communicate decisions clearly, and move from prototype to production with care

Collaborative & Self-Directed
Clear communicator who works well in async teams
Able to self-manage and deliver high-quality results independently
Comfortable collaborating with founders, designers, customers, and other engineers across time zones

Craft-Focused Engineer
You care deeply about UX, performance, maintainability, accessibility, and small product details
You aim to ship delightful, impactful features, not just functional code


Apply if you've built: complex web apps, interactive dashboards, workflow tools, AI products, developer platforms, or have a GitHub profile full of clean, well-documented code.

Able to self-manage and deliver high-quality results independently
Comfortable collaborating with founders, designers, customers, and other engineers across time zones

Craft-Focused Engineer
You care deeply about UX, performance, maintainability, accessibility, and small product details
You aim to ship delightful, impactful features, not just functional code


Apply if you've built: complex web apps, interactive dashboards, workflow tools, AI products, developer platforms, or have a GitHub profile full of clean, well-documented code.
